message:
test(graphql): add test suites for error, operation, pagination, retry, and schema modules

Add ~1,063 lines of new tests across the fcp-graphql crate:

- error.rs (+511): HttpErrorInfo/GraphqlErrorLocation/GraphqlPathSegment
  serde, Display for all variants (Http, HttpStatus, Json, GraphqlErrors,
  Protocol, SchemaValidation, RetriesExhausted), is_retryable() for all
  variants, to_fcp_error() mapping for status codes (429 w/ retry_after,
  401, 403, 500, JSON, protocol, schema validation, retries exhausted)
- operation.rs (+144): GraphqlQuery (new, from_static, serde, clone/eq),
  GraphqlRequest (with/without operation_name, serde skip None),
  GraphqlBatchItem, GraphqlResponse (is_ok, minimal JSON, partial data)
- pagination.rs (+77): PageLimit, CursorPageInfo/Page, OffsetPage traits,
  PaginationError Display and From<GraphqlClientError>
- retry.rs (+215): RetryPolicy defaults, decide() at/beyond max_attempts,
  non-retryable errors, Never/IdempotentOnly/Always strategies, exponential
  backoff doubling, max_delay cap, jitter bounds, 429 retry_after override
- schema.rs (+116): SchemaCache get_or_compile (valid/invalid, Arc::ptr_eq
  caching), validate pass/fail, multiple errors, different schemas cached
  separately, empty object against no-required

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
